state.title: Ticket create can produce tickets with empty string ticket_id
state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). Two tickets found with empty string ticket_id — cannot be edited, transitioned, or referenced.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: ROOT CAUSE: os.path.basename() returns empty string when path ends with '/'. Bash glob pattern */; in ticket-lib.sh:278 (ticket_find_open_children) and ticket-fsck.sh:75 produce trailing-slash paths. These paths are passed to ticket-reducer.py CLI, which sets ticket_id = os.path.basename(ticket_dir) = ''. The cache is then written with ticket_id='', poisoning all subsequent reads. Three affected callers: ticket-lib.sh:278, ticket-fsck.sh:75,82. ticket-list.sh:69 is safe (strips trailing slash).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
